question_text: Which statement about gravity is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Gravity only acts on objects that are in contact with Earth

options.label: B
options.text: Gravity is a non-contact force that pulls objects towards Earth

options.label: C
options.text: Gravity makes all objects fall at different speeds

options.label: D
options.text: Gravity is a contact force between two surfaces

explanation: Gravity is a non-contact force because it acts over a distance without surfaces needing to touch. It pulls objects towards Earth and acts on all objects with mass.
